Supported Langauges 🌐 ​

Extended list of supported languages for the ln parameter.

Userscript = all languages. ​

Reason behind is it fetches langauge from directly hCaptcha api.

Chrome Extension = all languages(beta). ​

Reason behind is it fetches langauge from directly hCaptcha api.
